data.title: Buybuy Baby closing stores to go fully digital
data.description: The company's closings come as buybuy Baby's former sister brand Bed Bath & Beyond prepares to return to physical retail stores.

data.title: Kirkland’s and Beyond partner to pave Bed Bath & Beyond's return to physical stores
data.description: Beyond plans to invest $25 million through a combined debt and equity transaction as Kirkland's becomes a licensee for new small-format Bed Bath & Beyond locations.

data.title: Salesforce launches small-business integrated commerce suites
data.description: Salesforce says the new ecommerce storefront suites on ilts CRM platform provide small but growing companies with a unified  interface for ecommerce, sales, service, and marketing operations.

data.title: How retail and B2B brands align business with sustainability and social values
data.description: October's issue of Strategy Insights looked at approaches to brand values and sustainability at Amazon.com, Etsy and Global Industrial Corp.

data.title: Digital distributor Parts Town pushes deeper into HVAC
data.description: To support this growth, the company has launched Truck Stock, a new online category offering essential parts, tools, and accessories that HVAC technicians need for their service trucks or vans.
